title: festuca vaginata var. dominii
intro: Festuca vaginata var. dominii, also known as Domin's fescue, is a variety of grass-like plant in the family Poaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Festuca vaginata var. dominii may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although the plant's safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
